heroSubtitle: Math missions, daily rewards, boss battles, and friendly rankings for ages 6-14.
recommendationText: Complete your first mission to unlock smart recommendations.
recommendationStart: Start with an easy addition race to build confidence.
recommendationPracticeAccuracy: Practice this topic slowly in Memory Math until accuracy improves.
recommendationStreakChallenge: Your streak is strong. Try a boss challenge next.
recommendationSpeedRun: You are ready for a timed speed run.
recommendationNextTopic: Try the next topic to keep your skills balanced.
authConfirmEmail: Account created. Check your email to confirm it.
raceGoal: Solve to move your racer forward.
spaceGoal: Tap the correct target, then solve.
puzzleGoal: Each correct answer unlocks puzzle pieces.
timeAttackGoal: Beat the clock with fast answers.
memoryGoal: Match the equation with its answer.
bossGoal: Correct answers lower the boss HP.
stepGameModeHint: Choose a game mode to continue.
stepMainBlockHint: Start solving in the main block.
authGateText: Missions, rewards, rankings, and saved progress are available after parent login.
missionSavePrompt: Want to keep your rating and progress? Register or log in.
missionSavedHint: Your result will be stored in your rating history and best score.
missionSaveUnavailable: Saving is unavailable in demo mode.
hintAddition: Add the numbers one step at a time.
hintSubtraction: Start with the bigger number and count backward.
hintMultiplication: Think of equal groups, then count the groups.
hintDivision: Ask how many equal groups fit into the total.
hintFractions: Keep the denominator the same, then work with the top numbers.
hintGeometry: Area of a square is side times side.
hintLogic: Look at how much the numbers grow each step.
hintTimed: Slow down for one clean step before answering.
